updateNote: Day 13 — Six vessels attacked in Gulf/Hormuz (total 16 ships struck), Iraq shuts oil ports. Iran publishes target list of US tech giant offices (Amazon, Google, Microsoft, Nvidia). First Iran cyberattack on US company (Stryker). Israel strikes central Beirut apartment + seafront (7 killed). Lebanon toll: 634 killed, 816K displaced. Oil surges: Brent $94.77, WTI $93.24. Hezbollah rocket hits central Israel. Added live video section to home page. V1.9 update.
